_meta.description: Seed data for the SUNRISE OSS lookup tables: OfferType, Domain, TargetProfile, SourceType, UserRole, and Contact.role reference values. v2.0, March 2026.
_meta.instructions: Load each top-level array into the corresponding table. Replace UUID placeholder strings with actual UUIDs before loading. The worked_example illustrates a complete Offer record using Task 1 field names.

offer_types.name: internship
offer_types.description: Work experience placement at an external organization. Primary output is practical industry experience. May be embedded within a degree programme or stand-alone.

offer_types.name: thesis
offer_types.description: Supervised research project resulting in a written dissertation or thesis document. Includes licentiate theses, PhD dissertations, and research abroad programmes where the primary output is a research document.

offer_types.name: challenge
offer_types.description: Open problem-solving competition posed by a university or company partner. Teams or individuals submit solutions within a defined timeframe. Typically includes a prize or recognition component.

offer_types.name: hackathon
offer_types.description: Intensive time-limited collaborative event where participants build a prototype or solution, usually over 24-48 hours. May be co-organised with industry partners.

offer_types.name: event
offer_types.description: One-way attendance offering: conference, exhibition, book presentation, guided tour, or dissemination event. Audience consumes content rather than producing or practicing. Has a specific date range.

offer_types.name: mobility
offer_types.description: Study, research, or work period at a partner institution in another country. Includes Erasmus programmes, study abroad, traineeship abroad, and joint degree components requiring physical relocation.

offer_types.name: expertise
offer_types.description: Access to a named expert, professor, or researcher for collaboration, consultation, or joint project. The offering surfaces a person's skills and availability rather than a structured programme.

offer_types.name: lab
offer_types.description: Access to a physical or virtual laboratory, research facility, or specialised equipment. Includes teaching labs, competence centre facilities, and EduSpaces-type facility clusters.

offer_types.name: service
offer_types.description: Professional support service provided by a university unit to companies or individuals. Includes business advisory, patent licensing, IP management, legal support, and TTO services.

offer_types.name: co_creation
offer_types.description: Collaborative project where a university and an external partner jointly define and develop a solution, product, or research output. Includes spin-off support and innovation co-design activities.

offer_types.name: training
offer_types.description: Structured learning programme with a defined curriculum. Covers degree programmes (Bachelor, Master, Executive Master, PhD) and short professional development courses. Use this type whenever ECTS credits are awarded or the offering leads to a formal qualification.

offer_types.name: testbed
offer_types.description: Access to a controlled environment for testing, validating, or demonstrating technologies, products, or processes. Distinct from lab in that the primary purpose is industrial or product validation rather than research or teaching.

offer_types.name: research_group
offer_types.description: A listing or profile of a research group, specialisation, or department surfaced as a discoverable offer. Allows companies and researchers to find and contact active research communities around a topic.

offer_types.name: funding_partner
offer_types.description: Funding opportunity or partnership offer where a university or partner organisation provides financial support, joint grant participation, or doctoral programme funding (e.g. DIN). Includes calls for research funding.

offer_types.name: project_opportunity
offer_types.description: An open invitation to collaborate on a defined research or innovation project. The university or company has a project underway or planned and is seeking a partner, researcher, or student to join.

target_profiles.name: student
target_profiles.description: Undergraduate or postgraduate student seeking programmes, internships, thesis opportunities, or campus events.

target_profiles.name: company
target_profiles.description: SME, startup, or large enterprise seeking research collaboration, services, talent, or co-creation with a university.

target_profiles.name: researcher
target_profiles.description: Academic, postdoc, or industry researcher seeking joint projects, lab access, expertise, or funding partners.

source_types.name: scraping
source_types.description: Offer record ingested by automated web crawl or scraper. Requires curator review before publishing.

source_types.name: manual
source_types.description: Offer record created or edited directly by a partner admin or content curator.

organization_types.description: SUNRISE partner university or academic institution.
Research institute, public body, NGO, or any non-university non-company entity.

user_roles.name: admin
user_roles.description: OSS platform administrator. Full CRUD access across all organizations.

user_roles.name: researcher
user_roles.description: University staff or academic. Can create and manage Offer records for their organization.

user_roles.name: company
user_roles.description: Company user. Can browse, save, and enquire about offers.

user_roles.name: student
user_roles.description: Student user. Can browse and apply to offers marked as student-facing.

contact_roles.description: Academic responsible for a degree programme. Typically listed on programme pages as 'Degree Course Director' (UNIBZ) or equivalent.
Head of a research group, department, or specialisation. May be titled 'Research Specialisation Coordinator' (MDU) or 'Department Director' (UniUD).
TTO staff responsible for IP, patents, and industry partnerships.
Staff at an innovation hub or science park (e.g. NOI Techpark) managing company relations.
Faculty secretariat or registrar. Generic administrative point of contact.
Staff providing advice to prospective or enrolled students on applications and programmes.
Elected student body representative listed on programme pages. Low priority for public display.
University contact managing relationships with industry partners and co-creation projects.
Member of a university research ethics committee. Governance role; does not produce offerings.
Staff managing internship or job placement programmes. Titled 'Job Placement Coordinator' at UniUD.
Staff responsible for organising conferences, exhibitions, or campus events.
Catch-all for contacts that do not fit a more specific role. Prefer a specific value where possible.

worked_example._comment: Complete Offer record for the UNIBZ Master in Software Engineering. Illustrates all Task 1 Offer fields. Replace UUID placeholders with real values before loading.

offer.title: Master in Software Engineering
offer.summary: The Master in Software Engineering at UNIBZ prepares graduates for roles as software engineers working across analysis, design, implementation, customisation, and maintenance of intelligent software solutions. The programme integrates AI throughout multiple courses, with hands-on coverage of Cloud Computing, IoT, Data Analytics, and cyber-physical systems.

details.location: NOI Techpark Bozen-Bolzano, Bruno-Buozzi-Str. 1, 39100 Bozen-Bolzano, Italy

contact._comment: Contact record — Task 1 fields only: id, contact_name, email, phone, role. Two fields below are prefixed '_pending_' because they require Data Model Team decisions before they can be used in production. See OSS_Ontology_Mapping_Rules.md Section 4 for full details.
contact._decision_D01: ADD contact_approved boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false to Contact table (GDPR gating, NFR-07). Without this column, ingestion cannot safely gate public display of personal contact details.
contact._decision_D02: DEFINE Offer-Contact relationship cardinality. Recommended: OfferContact junction table (offer_id, contact_id). Current Task 1 schema has no FK between Contact and Offer.

administrative_contact._comment: Secretariat email — no named individual. Resolve to Organization record rather than creating a Contact.
administrative_contact.resolves_to: Organization: UNIBZ Faculty of Engineering Secretariat (administrative contact)
